description:
You are an Electrical Engineer working on a circuit analysis library located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/circuit_analyzer/. The project structure and test suite are fully defined, but the core calculation logic is stubbed out with NotImplementedError. Implement the missing logic in the circuit_analyzer package so that all 25 tests pass.

Implement the following:
- circuits/components.py: impedance for Capacitor and Inductor
- circuits/networks.py: series_impedance, parallel_impedance, voltage_divider, and current_divider
- circuits/ac_analysis.py: AC power and resonance calculations
- circuits/analysis.py: Thevenin/Norton equivalents and max power transfer

Do not modify the test files in tests/ and use standard Python math/cmath libraries.
